tasks.label: check-mongosh
args: if (Get-Command mongosh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { mongosh --version } else { Write-Output 'MONGOSH_NOT_FOUND' }

tasks.label: list-mongo-collections
args: Set-Location 'c:\Users\ASUS\Desktop\Clone\education-backend'; node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const mongoose=require('mongoose'); (async()=>{ try{ await mongoose.connect(process.env.MONGODB_URI); const cols=await mongoose.connection.db.listCollections().toArray(); console.log('DB_OK'); console.log('Collections:', cols.map(c=>c.name).join(', ') || '(none)'); }catch(e){ console.error('DB_ERROR', e.message); process.exitCode=1; } finally { await mongoose.disconnect(); } })();"

tasks.label: docker-up-mongo
args: Set-Location 'c:\Users\ASUS\Desktop\Clone\education-backend'; docker compose up -d; docker compose ps

tasks.label: start-postgres-stack
args: Set-Location 'c:\Users\ASUS\Desktop\Clone\education-backend'; docker compose up -d; docker compose ps

tasks.label: remove-mongo-orphans
args: Set-Location 'c:\Users\ASUS\Desktop\Clone\education-backend'; docker compose up -d --remove-orphans; docker compose ps

tasks.label: kill-port-5000
args: $pid = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess); if ($pid) { Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force; Write-Output ('KILLED_PID=' + $pid) } else { Write-Output 'NO_PROCESS_ON_5000' }

tasks.label: postgres-auth-smoke
args: $email = ('pgtest_' + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N').Substring(0,8) + '@example.com'); $registerBody = @{name='PG Test'; email=$email; password='password123'} | ConvertTo-Json; $reg = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:5001/api/auth/register' -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $registerBody; $loginBody = @{email=$email; password='password123'} | ConvertTo-Json; $login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:5001/api/auth/login' -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $loginBody; Write-Output ('REGISTER_ID=' + $reg.user.id); Write-Output ('LOGIN_TOKEN_LEN=' + $login.token.Length)
